creator: iio7@tutanota.com
text:
After upgrading to 14.0-RELEASE from 13.2, which - as far as I can tell - downgraded Radarr, it cannot start.

From /var/log/messages:

Nov 22 04:57:22 foo kernel: pid 12362 (Radarr), jid 0, uid 352: exited on signal 6 (no core dump - other error)
Nov 22 04:57:29 foo kernel: pid 14058 (Radarr), jid 0, uid 352: exited on signal 6 (no core dump - other error)
Nov 22 04:57:36 foo kernel: pid 14782 (Radarr), jid 0, uid 352: exited on signal 6 (no core dump - other error)
Nov 22 04:57:43 foo kernel: pid 15741 (Radarr), jid 0, uid 352: exited on signal 6 (no core dump - other error)

From the Radarr log with debug enabled:

2023-11-22 04:57:54.7|Info|Bootstrap|Starting Radarr - /usr/local/share/radarr/bin/Radarr - Version 5.0.3.8127
2023-11-22 04:57:55.4|Info|AppFolderInfo|Data directory is being overridden to [/usr/local/radarr]
2023-11-22 04:57:55.8|Info|AppFolderInfo|Data directory is being overridden to [/usr/local/radarr]
2023-11-22 04:57:57.6|Info|AppFolderInfo|Data directory is being overridden to [/usr/local/radarr]
2023-11-22 04:58:01.9|Info|Bootstrap|Starting Radarr - /usr/local/share/radarr/bin/Radarr - Version 5.0.3.8127
2023-11-22 04:58:02.6|Info|AppFolderInfo|Data directory is being overridden to [/usr/local/radarr]
2023-11-22 04:58:03.0|Info|AppFolderInfo|Data directory is being overridden to [/usr/local/radarr]
2023-11-22 04:58:04.8|Info|AppFolderInfo|Data directory is being overridden to [/usr/local/radarr]
2023-11-22 04:58:09.2|Info|Bootstrap|Starting Radarr - /usr/local/share/radarr/bin/Radarr - Version 5.0.3.8127
2023-11-22 04:58:09.8|Info|AppFolderInfo|Data directory is being overridden to [/usr/local/radarr]
2023-11-22 04:58:10.3|Info|AppFolderInfo|Data directory is being overridden to [/usr/local/radarr]

And this just keep going.
